title: Rebuilt of Mowziemobs structure
description: Rebuild the structure in mowziemobs and support more mods
body:
## 描述
这个数据包中重建了mowziesmobs的锻造室结构，使其不那么简陋，我将添加对更多mod的支持！

我把一些怪物的刷怪笼放在了结构里（诶嘿）!
## 这个数据包怎么工作的?
我修改了freednaut_chamber.nbt的内容，使其生成成为我所想要的样子。（希望你能走到正门)
如果安装了Mowziemobs，这个数据包可以单独使用，当然，我建议使用一些全局加载数据包的mod，例如paxi。
## description
This datapack rebuilds the Wroughtnaut Chamber structure in mowziemobs to make it less rudimentary, the original version was built using vanilla's blocks, I'll add support for more mods!

I put some mobs spawners in the structure and they made the structure a little more difficult
### How does this datapack work?
I modified the contents of wroughtnaut_chamber.nbt so that it was generated to be what I expected.

This datapack can be used on its own, provided that you have Mowziemobs installed, of course, I recommend using some mods that load datapack globally, such as paxi
## Update plan
Add Frostmaw's Lair
Added support for more mods
